enonce.texte:
Classify the following foods into Healthy and Unhealthy columns.

fruits, vegetables, candy, fish, rice, soda, meat, chips, water, cake, milk, fried food

questions.texte: Classify the foods into Healthy and Unhealthy columns.
questions.reponse: Healthy: fruits, vegetables, fish, rice, meat, water, milk. Unhealthy: candy, soda, chips, cake, fried food.

enonce.texte:
Complete the sentences with the words from the box.

healthy | unhealthy | like | don't like | breakfast | important
  1. Fruits and vegetables are ______ for our body.
  2. I ______ eating candy because it is bad for my teeth.
  3. ______ is the most important meal of the day.
  4. My mother says it is ______ to eat a balanced diet.
  5. I ______ eating fish. It is delicious!

questions.texte: Complete the sentences with the words from the box.
questions.reponse: 1. healthy, 2. don't like, 3. Breakfast, 4. important, 5. like

enonce.texte:
Read the statements and write True or False.

  1. Eating fruits and vegetables is good for your health.
  2. Drinking too much soda is healthy.
  3. Breakfast is an important meal.
  4. Eating a balanced diet helps you stay healthy.
  5. Fried food is good for your health.

questions.texte: Eating fruits and vegetables is good for your health.
Drinking too much soda is healthy.
Eating a balanced diet helps you stay healthy.
Fried food is good for your health.

enonce.texte:
Read the text and answer the questions.

"My name is Amina. I am in class 6ème. I like to eat healthy food. For breakfast, I eat bread, an egg, and drink milk. For lunch, I eat rice with vegetables and fish. For dinner, I eat yam with sauce and meat. I also drink water every day. I don't like soda because it is not good for my teeth. I love fruits like bananas and oranges. My mother says it is important to eat well to stay healthy."
  1. What does Amina eat for breakfast?
  2. What does Amina eat for lunch?
  3. What does Amina drink every day?
  4. Why doesn't Amina like soda?
  5. What does Amina love?

questions.texte: What does Amina eat for breakfast?
questions.reponse: Amina eats bread, an egg, and drinks milk for breakfast.

questions.texte: What does Amina eat for lunch?
questions.reponse: Amina eats rice with vegetables and fish for lunch.

questions.texte: What does Amina drink every day?

questions.reponse: Amina doesn't like soda because it is not good for her teeth.
Amina loves fruits like bananas and oranges.

enonce.texte:
Write sentences about your food preferences. Use the expressions below.

  • I like...
  • I don't like...
  • I love...
  • I hate...

Example: I like fruits because they are healthy.

  1. Write a sentence with "I like" about a healthy food.
  2. Write a sentence with "I don't like" about an unhealthy food.
  3. Write a sentence with "I love" about a healthy drink.
  4. Write a sentence with "I hate" about a food that is bad for health.

questions.texte: Write a sentence with "I like" about a healthy food.
questions.reponse: I like vegetables because they are good for me.

questions.texte: Write a sentence with "I don't like" about an unhealthy food.
questions.reponse: I don't like candy because it is bad for my teeth.

questions.texte: Write a sentence with "I love" about a healthy drink.
questions.reponse: I love water because it is healthy.

questions.texte: Write a sentence with "I hate" about a food that is bad for health.
questions.reponse: I hate fried food because it is not good for my health.

enonce.texte:
Write 4-5 sentences describing your menu for one day. Include:

  • What you eat for breakfast, lunch, and dinner
  • What you drink
  • Why your menu is healthy

Example: "For breakfast, I eat bread and drink milk. For lunch, I eat rice with vegetables and fish. For dinner, I eat yam with sauce. I drink water every day. My menu is healthy because I eat fruits and vegetables."

questions.texte: Write 4-5 sentences describing your healthy menu for one day.
questions.reponse: Réponse personnelle de l'élève. Exemple: For breakfast, I eat bread and drink milk. For lunch, I eat rice with vegetables and fish. For dinner, I eat yam with sauce. I drink water every day. My menu is healthy because I eat fruits and vegetables.
